name: api-testing-postman
description: Postman API testing collection with Newman automation

scripts.test: newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/environment.json --reporters cli,html --reporter-html-export results/report.html
scripts.test:html: newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/environment.json --reporters html --reporter-html-export results/report.html
scripts.test:json: newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/environment.json --reporters json --reporter-json-export results/report.json
scripts.test:all: npm run test:html && npm run test:json

author: Seoback04
